last_result.effect: EasyCrypt accepted a proof-state change; the refreshed view is based on the new committed state.
last_result.proof_state: The committed EasyCrypt proof state changed.

source.label: Parsed from EasyCrypt pretty goal text

moves.title: Concrete tactic candidate
moves.applicability: This tactic is already concrete for the current goal.
moves.effect: Committing this tactic would change the EasyCrypt proof state if EasyCrypt accepts it.
evidence: EasyCrypt reports no remaining goals after the latest tactic; commit `qed.` to save the lemma before final verification.

cut_position.tactic: seq 1 : (g ^ G1.u \in map (fun (t : PKE_.ciphertext) => t.`1) G3.cilog /\ G1.g_ ^ G1.u' \in map (fun (t : PKE_.ciphertext) => t.`2) G3.cilog /\ g ^ r' \in map (fun (t : PKE_.ciphertext) => t.`3) G3.cilog /\ size G3.cilog <= PKE_.qD /\ G1.w <> zero /\ G1.g_ = g ^ G1.w) (PKE_.qD%r / order%r) (PKE_.qD%r / order%r) 1%r 0%r.

selected_handles.title: Concrete tactic candidate
selected_handles.why_relevant: EasyCrypt reports no remaining goals after the latest tactic; commit `qed.` to save the lemma before final verification.

notes.message: event log says candidate_closed and current EC state is indeterminate

inspect_lookup_handles.effect: All handles here are read-only manager requests; the committed EasyCrypt proof state stays unchanged.
inspect_lookup_handles.manager_note: Some requests may ask EasyCrypt or name resolution; wait for the manager result before choosing the next proof intent.

ask_manager_for.use_when: No fresh recommendation is available; parse the current goal.
ask_manager_for.returns: manager-provided read-only context for this proof route

items.label: Before latest call-obligation tactic #86
items.why_checkpoint: call-obligation local boundary; selecting it keeps the opened call obligation and removes later local work
items.effect_if_selected: Undo committed tactic #86 and every committed tactic after it in this node.

items.label: After seq opened / before branch work #43
items.why_checkpoint: seq-local branch boundary; selecting it keeps the seq cut and removes branch-local work after it
items.effect_if_selected: Undo committed tactic #43 and every committed tactic after it in this node.

items.label: After call opened / before obligation work #84
items.why_checkpoint: call-local boundary; selecting it keeps the call tactic and removes work committed after the call opened
items.effect_if_selected: Undo committed tactic #84 and every committed tactic after it in this node.

items.label: Before call invariant #83
items.committed_tactic: call (_: ! ((G3.a, G3.a_, G3.c, G3.d) \in G3.cilog) /\ G1.cstar <> None).
items.why_checkpoint: call invariant introduction point; later oracle/branch obligations often reveal missing preserved facts or an over-strong equality from this tactic
items.effect_if_selected: Undo committed tactic #83 and every committed tactic after it in this node.

items.label: Before product-budget seq cut #42
items.committed_tactic: seq 1 : (g ^ G1.u \in map (fun (t : PKE_.ciphertext) => t.`1) G3.cilog /\ G1.g_ ^ G1.u' \in map (fun (t : PKE_.ciphertext) => t.`2) G3.cilog /\ g ^ r' \in map (fun (t : PKE_.ciphertext) => t.`3) G3.cilog /\ size G3.cilog <= PKE_.qD /\ G1.w <> zero /\ G1.g_ = g ^ G1.w) (PKE_.qD%r / order%r) (PKE_.qD%r / order%r) 1%r 0%r.
items.why_checkpoint: seq-cut boundary; selecting it restores the proof state before this cut was committed
items.effect_if_selected: Undo committed tactic #42 and every committed tactic after it in this node.

items.label: Return to resume start
items.committed_tactic: conseq (: _ ==> (g ^ G1.u \in map (fun (t : ciphertext) => t.`1) G3.cilog) /\ (G1.g_ ^ G1.u' \in map (fun (t : ciphertext) => t.`2) G3.cilog) /\ (g ^ r' \in map (fun (t : ciphertext) => t.`3) G3.cilog) /\ (g ^ r \in map (fun (t : ciphertext) => t.`4) G3.cilog) /\ size G3.cilog <= PKE_.qD /\ G1.w <> zero /\ G1.g_ = g ^ G1.w).
items.why_checkpoint: resume boundary; selecting it preserves the verified replay prefix and removes tactics committed after resume
items.effect_if_selected: Undo committed tactic #18 and every committed tactic after it in this node.
